channel.title: web on Lisa DeBruine
channel.description: Recent content in web on Lisa DeBruine

item.title: Hidden Solutions
item.description: library(tidyverse) The R for Reproducible Scientific Analysis pages at software carpentry have a really nice interface for hiding and showing solutions to exercises. I’ve created my own lightweight solution that you can use in any html file, including those made by RMarkdown (e.g., R notebooks). Example Graph the relationship between speed and distance for the cars dataset. Solution You can put some text inside the solution, as well as code cunks.
